title: InventorySee
description: A Simple /Invsee Minecraft Plugin For Moderators
body:
# InventorySee  
A powerful and lightweight staff tool that lets you view, edit, and lock player inventories — all in real time.  
Simple, fast, and built for modern Paper servers.  

---

## ****Features****
- ****/invsee**** — view a player’s inventory in read-only mode.  
- ****/invopen**** — open and edit a player’s inventory live; all changes instantly apply.  
- ****/invlock**** — lock or unlock a player’s inventory to block any item movement or interaction.  
- Locked players get clear red messages when they try to interact, drop, or pick up items.  
- Fully synced inventories — what you see is what the player really has.  
- Customizable messages, titles, and logs via config.yml.  
- Beautiful color-coded logs in both console and file.  
- All commands and logic packed neatly in a single, optimized class.  
- Lightweight — no dependencies required.  

---

## ****Commands****
| Command | Description | Permission |  
|----------|--------------|-------------|  
| ****/invsee {player}**** | View another player’s inventory in read-only mode. | inventorysee.view |  
| ****/invopen {player}**** | Edit a player’s inventory live (real-time sync). | inventorysee.open |  
| ****/invlock {player}**** | Lock or unlock a player’s inventory. | inventorysee.lock |  

---

## ****Permissions****
| Permission | Description | Default |  
|-------------|--------------|----------|  
| ****inventorysee.view**** | Allows viewing player inventories. | OP |  
| ****inventorysee.open**** | Allows editing player inventories. | OP |  
| ****inventorysee.lock**** | Allows locking and unlocking player inventories. | OP |  

---

## ****Config****
A full configuration file is generated automatically on first run.  
You can customize all messages, GUI titles, and logs:
